assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item related to testing
assertion_results.evidence: Priority 4 in the action plan: 'Write 3–5 integration tests for critical API paths | 1–2 days | First automated correctness signal'

assertion_results.text: Output must mention the absence of a staging environment
assertion_results.evidence: Executive Summary: 'no staging environment' and Section 3 Current State: 'Local development and production only. No staging environment.'

assertion_results.text: Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
assertion_results.evidence: The report contains no numeric scoring system. CI/CD is described qualitatively as 'High Risk' but no X/5 score is assigned to any domain.

assertion_results.text: Output must recommend a specific test type to adopt first, not just 'add tests'
assertion_results.evidence: Testing Recommendations #1: 'Begin with integration tests for the most critical API endpoints (authentication, billing, core data flows). These provide the highest return on investment at this stage.'

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend a full test suite rewrite as the first step
assertion_results.evidence: Testing Recommendations #4: 'Do not attempt to retroactively test all existing code at once — prioritize by business criticality and risk of change.'
